4 audiences × 18 personas. Each persona maps to specific portal(s) + features.
Toàn quyền platform. Manage infrastructure, all tenants, security, emergency interventions.
All P1 features; emergency override; cross-tenant queries (admin role); LLM provider config
Day-to-day platform ops. Manage workspaces, billing, plans, monitor health.
P1 workspaces, billing, plan config, health dashboard, LLM token monitoring
Theo dõi adoption health của customers, intervene khi at-risk, schedule QBR.
CSM dashboard, adoption health view, intervention triggers, customer cohort view
Resolve support tickets, debug customer issues (read-only by default; escalation grants temp write).
Read-only access via tenant impersonation, audit trail review, log search
Track sales pipeline, conversion (Pilot → Enterprise), upsell opportunities.
Pilot conversion tracking, billing monitor, tenant cohort view, ROI showcases
Tổng hợp doanh thu, invoice, overage, FX rate, monthly close.
Billing aggregations, invoice generation, FX management, accounting export
Decision maker. Quan tâm ROI, NOV (VND), strategic decisions, team management.
Dashboard, ROI/NOV reports, OKR, strategy timeline, approval gates, member management
BASIC, MID, MAX (all features visible per tier)
Head of Sales / Marketing / Operations / Finance
Team lead. Approve workflows, review insights, monitor department adoption + NOV.
Department dashboard, workflow approvals, adoption health, NOV by dept, criterion tuning
Build pipelines + insights. Tune AI parameters. Validate outputs with domain expertise.
Pipeline builder (5-step), insights generation, criteria tuning, formula library, RAG queries
Marketing Manager / Sales Ops / Inventory Manager
Daily user. Use workflows, follow recommendations, override AI when needed.
Workflow runtime, insight consumption, override AI decisions, request reports
Read-only review. Audit decisions, trace AI explanations, compliance reports.
Audit log read, decision explainability, compliance reports, RBAC matrix view
Setup integrations, manage users, configure SSO, monitor performance.
Integration management, user CRUD, SSO config, secrets management, performance monitor
Limited view of high-level metrics + dashboards. Time-bounded access.
View shared dashboards, NOV summaries, insight feeds (filtered), no edit
Workflow Architect / Solutions Engineer (customer or partner)
Build custom workflows + AI logic for specific industries. Reuse templates.
Visual workflow builder, formula editor, custom criteria, prompt template editor, A/B test
Create industry-specific templates (retail, F&B, finance). Sell to other tenants.
Template authoring, marketplace listing (Phase 3), royalty tracking, version mgmt
Review and approve workflow templates before publish. Catch errors, ensure quality.
Template review queue, simulation runner, regression test, approval workflow
Individual SaaS. Personal data analysis, AI insights, simple workflows.
Personal dashboard, simple pipelines, individual insights, basic workflows
Power features at individual level. Custom criteria, integrations, mobile.
Advanced pipelines, custom formulas, mobile + Zalo bot, multi-source integration
